title: Sneak peek: Vibe coding AI agents course with Kaggle
summary: Google Cloud and Kaggle are launching a 5-day intensive course on "vibe coding," a natural language approach to autonomous AI agent development. The course covers agent workflows, external API integrations, agent-to-agent communication, and includes a capstone project called Kaggriculture where agents compete on a leaderboard.
